item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the prompt as metric trend decision analysis, stayed direct, and did not fire triage or frame it as repeated local repair pressure. It gave a clear initial judgment, analyzed each metric, preserved the complaint-direction ambiguity, and provided actionable decision rules without over-methodizing."}
